name: Probiotics
summary: Certain strains reduce antibiotic-associated diarrhea and IBS symptoms.
description: Probiotics can reduce antibiotic-associated diarrhea and may improve IBS symptoms through gut microbial balance and epithelial immune regulation, depending on strains.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
